zh.lifeSummary: Sir John Preston是Sir Laurence de Preston Knight- General的兒子，於大約1297年出生在蘇格蘭哈丁頓史爾普雷斯頓潘斯。他於1313年與Joan Capella結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和3個女兒的父母。他去世於大約1361年在英國蘇格蘭艾丁波享年66歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Sir John Preston是Sir Laurence de Preston Knight- General的儿子，于大约1297年出生在苏格兰哈丁頓史爾普雷斯頓潘斯。他于1313年与Joan Capella结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和3个女儿的父母。他去世于大约1361年在英国苏格兰艾丁波享年66岁。

nameMeanings.name: Preston
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: habitational name from one of the many places (most notably one in Lancashire) so called from Old English prēost ‘priest’ + tūn ‘farmstead, estate’.
occasionally from Middle English prest + son ‘son of the priest’. Priests were forbidden marriage but many produced illegitimate offspring.

variants.name: Presson
meanings: English (Cheshire and Lancashire): variant of   Preston  .
French: occupational name for a presser of wine or oil, from a derivative of presser ‘to press’.

variants.name: Prestwich
meanings: English (Lancashire): habitational name from a place in Lancashire (now Greater Manchester), so called from Old English prēost ‘priest’ + wīc ‘outlying settlement’, or from other places with the same derivation. Variants such as Prestidge, Prestage, etc., parallel the local pronunciation of the Lancashire name. Compare Preston .

nameMeanings.name: John
meanings: Greek: the Lord gave graciously; whom Jehovah gave; whom Jehovah bestowed.

en.lifeSummary: Sir John Preston was born about 1297, in Prestonpans, Haddingtonshire, Scotland as the son of Sir Laurence de Preston Knight- General. He married Joan Capella in 1313. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 3 daughters. He died about 1361, in Edinburgh, Scotland, United Kingdom, at the age of 66.

fr.lifeSummary: Sir John Preston est né environ 1297, à Prestonpans, Haddingtonshire, Écosse, fils de Sir Laurence de Preston Knight- General. Il a épousé Joan Capella en 1313. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 3 filles. Il est décédé environ 1361, à Edinburgh, Écosse, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 66 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Sir John Preston wurde um 1297 in Prestonpans, Haddingtonshire, Scotland, als Sohn von Sir Laurence de Preston Knight- General geboren. Er hat 1313 Joan Capella geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Er starb um 1361 im Alter von 66 Jahren in Edinburgh, Schottland, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Sir John Preston è nato il circa 1297 nel Prestonpans, Haddingtonshire, Scotland come figlio di Sir Laurence de Preston Knight- General. Lui sposato Joan Capella nel 1313. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 3 figlie. Morì circa 1361, nel Edinburgh, Scozia, Regno Unito, all'età di 66 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir John Prestonは約1297年にスコットランドハッドイントンシュアイアプレストンプアンスでSir Laurence de Preston Knight- Generalの息子として生まれた。1313年にJoan Capellaと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼は約1361年にイギリススコットランドエディンブルグで66歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir John Preston(은)는 대략 1297년 스컷랜드 하딩토실르 프레스토파스에서 Sir Laurence de Preston Knight- General의 아들로 태어났다. 그는 1313년 Joan Capella(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 대략 1361년 영국 스코틀랜드 에딘버그h에서 66세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Sir John Preston nasceu aproximadamente 1297, em Prestonpans, Haddingtonshire, Scotland filho de Sir Laurence de Preston Knight- General. Ele casou-se com Joan Capella em 1313. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 3 filhas. Ele faleceu aproximadamente 1361, em Edinburgh, Escócia, United Kingdom, com 66 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Sir John Preston родился около 1297 г. в местности престонпанс, хаддингтоншир, Шотландия. Его отца звали Sir Laurence de Preston Knight- General. Он женился на женщине по имени Joan Capella в 1313 г. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 3 дочери. Он умер около 1361 г. в местности эдинбург, Шотландия, Великобритания в возрасте 66 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Sir John Preston nació aproximadamente 1297, en Prestonpans, Haddingtonshire, Scotland como hijo de Sir Laurence de Preston Knight- General. Se casó con Joan Capella en 1313. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 3 hijas. Murió aproximadamente 1361, en Edinburgh, Escocia, Reino Unido, a la edad de 66 años.
